_comment: Named deployments for the unified tool. Each one selects an operating mode (simulation vs ingestion), a security profile (insecure vs hardened), a point model, and (for ingestion) a tag database. The control console and tase2ctl launch these by name. Add your own deployment here for a real testbed.

sim-demo.description: Simulation mode. Synthetic values from the server, connects to nothing. For training and capture.

modbus-stub.description: Ingestion mode with stub Modbus devices. Full pipeline with no hardware; plc3 is offline on purpose.

dnp3-demo.description: Ingestion mode over DNP3 with the bundled outstation simulator. No hardware needed.

hardened.description: Ingestion mode, hardened. Mutual TLS (Secure ICCP) plus a loopback command allowlist. Run scripts/gen_certs.sh first.
